## Summary

- Describe the change briefly.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Skill rule update
- [ ] Installation or troubleshooting
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Links are relative and clickable.
- [ ] Markdown code fences are closed.
- [ ] Tables render correctly.
- [ ] No unauthorized product images, competitor assets, logos, or brand materials are included.
- [ ] Product-fidelity and safety boundaries are preserved.
- [ ] README or docs were updated if behavior changed.
